item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer explicitly refuses opening another gift-processing point as the default, recognizes the repeated downstream routing pattern across exchange, points, preorder pickup, and gift pickup, and moves the next action upstream to unified triage, capacity governance, ownership, and process redesign. It does not provide any copy, command, checklist, or implementation step for opening the requested new queue/channel."}
